CONTINU ED

W. F. M. TO BOYCOTT


SPOKANE

pages.raw_text:
| Members of the Western Fedora
ton of Miners and Workers of the
World: Fellow Workers-The at
tempt to strangle the right Of free
! speech and the right of assembly
on the streets, by the government
of Spokane, Wash, and it's bene-
ficiaries. is on to finish. The
nature given rights of the militant
and all other workers of that city
are our rights. The fight is our
fight; their success or defeat is
our success or defeat and deepest
concern. Blood was spilled for the
right of free speech and free as
sembly. 1t was written in the con-
stitution of these United States by
the blood of the working class, and
by the same force and fluid, if ne
cessary, it shall remain an in
alienable right. Lives there a man
so dense as to not feel and protest
the dastardly attack of the organ
lied government of Spokane upon
the liberty to speak, to act, to think
in unison?


Workers of North America, we
now in your hands. Get out your
hammers, knock the city of Spo-
kane-she's an enemy of human
kind. A government of, by and for
those who have and toll not. Boy
colt her every product, knock ev-
cry commercial resource. There is
no coward like a commercial cow
ard BE it resolved


by the members of the West
ern Federation of Miners of the
